subject: [UUI] Update image of components of UUI

Patch Set 3:

Hi,
in the logs I see a couple of problems (https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating//134388-3/k8s-teardown/k8s-teardown/kubernetes-status/pod-onap-uui-intent-analysis-ff989999b-xj9xk-uui-intent-analysis-logs.html)
- missing config.json files
- pod starts with https, which will not work in case of enables ServiceMesh. It should run as http service

```
2023-05-26 09:59:21:277  INFO 9 --- [           main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource       : HikariPool-1 - Start completed.
2023-05-26 09:59:21:936  INFO 9 --- [           main] o.apache.coyote.http11.Http11NioProtocol : Starting ProtocolHandler ["https-jsse-nio-8083"]
2023-05-26 09:59:22:547  INFO 9 --- [           main] o.s.b.w.embedded.tomcat.TomcatWebServer  : Tomcat started on port(s): 8083 (https) with context path '/api/usecaseui-intent-analysis/v1'
2023-05-26 09:59:22:578  INFO 9 --- [           main] o.o.u.i.IntentAnalysisApplication        : Started IntentAnalysisApplication in 14.907 seconds (JVM running for 19.475)
```
